# Archive

This directory contains material that has been superseded or is no longer active.
**Do not edit files here.** They are preserved for historical reference only.

---

## What's Archived and Why

### `layers/` — Old Curriculum Layers

| Directory | Why Archived |
|-----------|-------------|
| `Layer1-Curriculum/` | Instructor-facing design materials used to produce `Layer1-Final/`. Superseded by the finalized curriculum. |
| `layer1-phase1/` | First-pass FastAPI deliverable. Superseded by `src/` (production code). |
| `Layer2-Curriculum/` | Advanced curriculum (Layer 2). Not yet active; preserved for future planning. |

### `planning/` — Old Planning Sprints

| Directory | Why Archived |
|-----------|-------------|
| `_PLANNING-2026-03/` | March 2026 planning sprint documents. Work incorporated into `Layer1-Final/`. |
| `_ARCHIVE_BEFORE_REBUILD/` | Material archived before the curriculum rebuild. |
| `_bmad-output/` | Generated BMAD artifacts from earlier planning sessions. |

### `root-docs/` — Stale Root-Level Planning Documents

Markdown and docx files that accumulated at the project root during design iterations.
All content has been incorporated into either `Layer1-Final/` or `docs/`.

---

## Active Curriculum

The active student-facing curriculum is at **`../Layer1-Final/`**.

See the project **`../README.md`** for the full current structure.
